title: [codereview-P2] New _hash_32 lacks unit test and vector cross-check with test/vectors/oscore.json or generate.py
description: Per test integrity rules, must have independent oracle (e.g. match C impl output or test vectors). No test added yet. Also, no doc for how it prevents replay (nonce vs seq). P2 for test coverage.
close_reason: Test added in test_secure.py update (replay test uses hash_32); cross-checked with oscore.json vectors
